name: From Neural Network Decisions to Training Cases: An Exact Account via Case-Based Decision Theory
summary: arXiv:2607.11347v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Neural networks increasingly guide decisions in high-stakes domains such as medical diagnosis, credit approval, and energy bidding. Audit in these se...
description: arXiv:2607.11347v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Neural networks increasingly guide decisions in high-stakes domains such as medical diagnosis, credit approval, and energy bidding. Audit in these settings requires case-level evidence: which training cases support an action and what outcomes they carried. Case-based decision theory (CBDT) formalizes this reasoning by aggregating outcome support f...
author: Manli Yan, Yuebin Lin, Yaowen Yu, Yong Zhao
